---
title: "Photography"
lightbox: true
---

<div style="columns: 3; column-gap: 10px; max-width: 900px; margin: auto;">

<img src="photos/PXL_20220323_021751755.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/PXL_20220323_025530649.NIGHT.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-8L18q92WX8g-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-Hv76ddFqKH4-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-NN6gNzLlfEM-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-T632eMad9E8-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-vvpqI98fT60-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-WCjeeeBJEH4-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-wZMVYtJXHm0-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:10px;" data-lightbox="gallery">

</div>
